chunks.text: Matlab Software - UCB Campus License Matlab Software - UCB Campus License public page Matlab licenses are purchased by the UC Berkeley software group using funds contributed by several campus units, including EECS. Individual ("stand-alone") licenses

ncluding EECS. Individual ("stand-alone") licenses are available to all members of the UCB campus from Software Central. Networked ("floating") licenses are also available for use on campus lab and clustered computers. Please see matlab.help

and clustered computers. Please see matlab.help for more information about Matlab on the EECS instructional computers. EECS Instructional Support Group (ISG) WEB: http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/~inst email: inst@eecs.berkeley.edu Thu Mar 19 05:32:3
